EVANS y. USF [SFSC CGC 08-473864]- [PROPOSED] ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE
PORTIONS OF FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT
-l-

 
con ~ |
1
2 Defendant University of San Francisco’s motion to strike portions of Plaintiff Jessie
3 ||Evans’ First Amended Complaint, filed on February 16, 2010, came on for regular hearing on
4 || April 15, 2010, in Courtroom 505 of the above captioned court, the Honorable John Stewart
5 ||presiding. Each party was represented by counsel of record.
6 Having reviewed all of the papers and considered oral arguments of the parties, and for
7 || good cause showing,
8 IT IS HEREBY ORDERED:
9 1) The motion to strike the entirety of Paragraph 24 from Plaintiff's First Amended
10 Complaint is granted. The entirety of Paragraph 24 is stricken.
11 2) The motion to strike the entirety of Paragraph 28 from Plaintiffs First Amended
12 Complaint is granted. The entirety of Paragraph 28 is stricken.
13 3) The motion to strike the words of Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint, . “and
14 colluding with Does 9 through 13 to terminate Evans’ employment,” at
15 Paragraph 33, page 8, lines 26-27, is denied.
16 4) The motion to strike the words, “and future” from paragraph (1) of Plaintiff's
17 prayer for wage loss relief, at page 10, line 9 of Plaintiffs First Amended |
18 Complaint, is granted. The words, “and future” in paragraph (1) of Plaintiff's
19 prayer for wage loss relief, at page 10, line 9 of Plaintiff's First Amended
20 Complaint, are stricken. oo
21 SO ORDERED.
